steps.title: Locate the specific definition of the style
steps.content: The notes reveal the defining characteristic of his distinctive style: “depicted this subject matter using abstract, modernist forms,” which is the method that sets his work apart.

steps.title: Match the answer to the goal
steps.content:
B directly presents the style's defining method: employing abstract, modernist forms to depict Native American figures.
  • A asserts a distinctive style exists without describing what it is
  • C addresses influence rather than the style's characteristics
  • D provides only a specific example
.

That confirms B is correct.
